product: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens (GA)
tagline: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens are now generally available.
what_it_does: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens are now generally available. To authenticate to the Databricks REST API, a user can create a personal access token (PAT) and use it in their REST API request. A user can also create a service principal and use it with a personal access token to call Databricks REST APIs in their CI/CD tools and automation.
why_it_matters: Databricks recommends you minimize your personal access token exposure with the following steps: 1.
plain_summary: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens are now generally available. To authenticate to the Databricks REST API, a user can create a personal access token (PAT) and use it in their REST API request.
key_takeaway: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens are now generally available.
